# terrible_dellemc_openmanage_dellemc_configure_idrac_eventing (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `address` (String) Email address for SNMP Trap.
- `alert_number` (Number) Alert number for Email configuration.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `authentication` (String) Simple Mail Transfer Protocol Authentication.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `custom_message` (String) Custom message for SNMP Trap reference.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `destination` (String) Destination for SNMP Trap.
- `destination_number` (Number) Destination number for SNMP Trap.
- `email_alert_state` (String) Whether to Enable or Disable Email alert.
- `enable_alerts` (String) Whether to Enable or Disable iDRAC alerts.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `password` (String) Password for SMTP authentication.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `share_mnt` (String) (deprecated)Local mount path of the network share with read-write permission for ansible user. This option is mandatory for Network Share. This option is deprecated and will be removed in the later version.
- `share_name` (String) (deprecated)Network share or a local path. This option is deprecated and will be removed in the later version.
- `share_password` (String) (deprecated)Network share user password. This option is mandatory for CIFS Network Share. This option is deprecated and will be removed in the later version.
- `share_user` (String) (deprecated)Network share user in the format 'user@domain' or 'domain\\user' if user is part of a domain else 'user'. This option is mandatory for CIFS Network Share. This option is deprecated and will be removed in the later version.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `smtp_ip_address` (String) Enter the IPv4 or IPv6 address of the SMTP server or the FQDN or DNS name.
- `smtp_port` (String) SMTP Port number for access.
- `snmp_trap_state` (String) Whether to Enable or Disable SNMP alert.
- `snmp_v3_username` (String) SNMP v3 username for SNMP Trap.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `username` (String) Username for SMTP authentication.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `error_info` (String) Details of the HTTP Error.
- `eventing_status` (String) Configures the iDRAC eventing attributes.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `msg` (String) Successfully configured the iDRAC eventing settings.
